project_common.outline_style: 2px solid outline included in sprite dimensions

shared_attributes.features: short front legs, large eyes, thick tail

context.role: Crouched state animation to avoid aerial obstacles
context.screen_position: Fixed at x=100px from left edge, y=0 (ground level)
context.usage_scenario: Displayed when Down arrow key or swipe down input is active, used to avoid Pterodactyl obstacles

visual_specification.shape: T-Rex dinosaur with neck lowered, body elongated horizontally
visual_specification.texture: pixel art, flat color, no gradients

animation.description: Ducking run cycle - frame 1: left leg forward with lowered neck, frame 2: right leg forward with lowered neck, same rhythm as running

visual_specification.details: Neck bent down, head lowered, body stretched horizontally, legs still running, tail extended, reduced hitbox height to 55px for collision

relationships.shared_with: Same color and animation FPS (12) as player_run
relationships.differences_from: player_run is 88x94px vertical, player_duck is 118x60px horizontal - significantly different dimensions and aspect ratio
